rationale: Keep: the citing paper explicitly states it "extends goal-gradient ... research" and studies loyalty-program point accumulation, which directly overlaps the cited paper’s core contribution on goal-gradient effects, illusionary progress, and retention in reward programs. Given this conceptual and setting-level alignment plus a direct DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.43.1.39), the citation is plausibly foundational/substantive rather than incidental.
